title: uzJJK
body:
# uzJJK
This Data pack brings the world of Jujutsu Kaisen to vanilla Minecraft. Wield cursed energy, master powerful techniques, and battle like a true sorcerer in a fast-paced, anime-inspired experience.

**_The official guide can be found in the Data pack's folder you download._** 

## Current Features
- Limitless Cursed Technique (Blue: Minimum + 3 variants / Blue: Lapse)
- Fully animation-handled fighting styles
- Quick, fast paced combat with many potential combos to make
